top_signals.title: Citi Says Investors Growing More Selective on Data Center Bonds
top_signals.summary: Bond investors are increasingly scrutinizing financing deals linked to artificial intelligence infrastructure buildouts, according to Citigroup Inc. analysts.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Cancer Drugmaker Parabilis Surges 58% in US Trading Debut
top_signals.summary: Parabilis Medicines Inc. shares jumped 58% in its trading debut, after the company raised nearly $745 million in an upsized US initial public offering that priced above its marketed range and a private placement.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Latham’s Kelly Forecasts Private Equity-Fueled Second-Half Surge
top_signals.summary: Mega deals will likely continue driving an M&A resurgence that will accelerate in the second half of 2026, with private equity keeping the pace, predicts Alex Kelly of Latham & Watkins.

top_signals.title: Oil Tankers Go Dark to Sneak More Gulf Barrels Through Hormuz - Bloomberg
top_signals.summary: Oil Tankers Go Dark to Sneak More Gulf Barrels Through Hormuz  Bloomberg
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: USDA's Rollins called screwworm a 'little pest' amid U.S. spread. Last year, she called it 'terrifying'
top_signals.summary: The U.S. agriculture secretary is downplaying the threat posed by the spreading screwworm now compared with her more dire remarks last year.
